message:
fix: wire up auto-fix for git merge driver %L/%R placeholders (bd-7yg)

The doctor check correctly detected invalid %L/%R placeholders in the
merge driver config, but `bd doctor --fix` had no handler for the
"Git Merge Driver" case — it fell through to the default "no auto-fix
available" branch.

- Add FixMergeDriver() in doctor/git.go to set correct config
- Wire "Git Merge Driver" case into applyFixList switch in doctor_fix.go
- Add tests verifying fix corrects %L/%R and missing configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -334,6 +334,8 @@ func applyFixList(path string, fixes []doctorCheck) {
 			err = fix.BrokenMigrationState(path)
 		case "SQLite Residue":
 			err = fix.SQLiteResidue(path)
+		case "Git Merge Driver":
+			err = doctor.FixMergeDriver()
 		default:
 			fmt.Printf("  ⚠ No automatic fix available for %s\n", check.Name)
 			fmt.Printf("  Manual fix: %s\n", check.Fix)
